approved_summary: External endpoints enforce TLS 1.2+ and legacy SSL is not enabled for public production traffic.
Supports SAML 2.0, OIDC, and role-based access control.
Audit logs retained for at least 365 days and can be exported to SIEM.
Independent penetration testing occurs annually and after material change.
Managed production service targets 99.9% uptime with RPO 15 minutes and RTO 4 hours.
Managed SaaS is preferred; single-tenant VPC is available; customer-managed deployment is limited and separately scoped.
Australian region hosting is supported for clients with local residency requirements.
Verified deletion requests are targeted within 30 days, subject to retention obligations.
Customer data is not used to train shared models by default; opt-in is required.
Pricing is annual or multi-year with renewal reviews; unlimited usage is not part of the default offer.
